_comment: DO NOT EDIT: this file was generated automatically by NovaSpark for Pterodactyl Panel import.
name: NovaSpark V13
author: mr-ntando-dev
description: NovaSpark V13 — Advanced WhatsApp/Discord Bot Hosting Platform with Live Terminal, AI Anomaly Detection, Event Bus, Plugin System, Secret Vault, CI/CD Pipelines, Status Pages, Resource Quotas, Rate Limiter, and Geo Regions.

config.startup: {"done": "All systems nominal. Ready to host bots."}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# NovaSpark V13 — Pterodactyl Install Script
set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl

# Install Node.js 22 if not present
if ! command -v node &>/dev/null || [[ "$(node -v)" != v22* ]]; then
  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  apt-get install -y nodejs
fi

cd /mnt/user-data/volumes/${P_SERVER_UUID}

# Clone or update repo
if [ -d ".git" ]; then
  echo "[install] Updating existing repo…"
  git pull
else
  echo "[install] Cloning NovaSpark V13…"
  git clone https://github.com/mr-ntando-dev/novaspark-host.git .
fi

# Create required directories
mkdir -p data/bots data/sessions data/backups

# Copy .env if missing
if [ ! -f .env ] && [ -f .env.example ]; then
  cp .env.example .env
fi

# Make entrypoint executable
chmod +x entrypoint.sh

echo "[install] NovaSpark V13 installed successfully."

variables.name: App URL
variables.description: Public URL of this NovaSpark instance (e.g. http://123.456.789.0:3000). Used for keep-alive pings and referral links.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: Port NovaSpark listens on. Must match the port allocated in the panel.

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for the default admin account created on first boot.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the default admin account. Change this before going live!

variables.name: JWT Secret
variables.description: Secret key for signing JWT access tokens. Use a long random string (32+ chars).

variables.name: JWT Refresh Secret
variables.description: Secret key for signing JWT refresh tokens. Must differ from JWT_SECRET.

variables.name: Vault Encryption Key
variables.description: AES-256 key for the Secret Vault. 32+ chars recommended. Falls back to JWT_SECRET if not set.

variables.name: Max RAM per Bot (MB)
variables.description: Maximum RAM a single bot process is allowed before being killed.

variables.name: Bot RAM Kill Threshold (MB)
variables.description: Force-kill a bot if it exceeds this RAM usage. Should be > BOT_MAX_RAM_MB.

variables.name: Max Bots (Global)
variables.description: Maximum number of bots allowed across all users on this instance.

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: (Optional) GitHub personal access token for cloning private bot repos.

variables.name: Anomaly Detection Sensitivity
variables.description: How sensitive AI anomaly detection is (1 = least, 10 = most). Default: 5.

variables.name: Default Region
variables.description: Default deploy region for new bots (e.g. us-east-1, eu-frankfurt, af-johannesburg).

variables.name: Max Old Space (MB)
variables.description: Node.js --max-old-space-size value. Set to ~80% of your container's total RAM.

variables.name: Stripe Secret Key
variables.description: (Optional) Stripe secret key for billing/subscription features.

variables.name: CI/CD Pipeline Webhook Secret
variables.description: (Optional) Secret for validating GitHub/GitLab CI/CD webhook payloads.
